summary: Session 3: D4 blessed writer + D3 completed-set toggle shipped end-to-end. Audit-first (s3-mode-read-audit.md, written before code): read_verification_mode is the single mode choke point (Q6 close gate, 7-state derivation, validator all resolve through it); start_session --type never reads the mode (no typed-session change needed); found+fixed the F3 hazard (capture idempotency had to learn the new kind or a later start_session could clobber the transition). Shipped: (1) dedicated_verification.change_verification_mode + python -m ai_router.change_verification_mode (dir-or-slug, --to, --json; exit 0/2/3) - gates fail-loud in order, nothing written on refusal: A->B only (B->A refused always), Lightweight only (fail closed on unconfirmable tier), unreadable activity log refused, effective mode out-of-band-or-none, no typed sessions, nothing in flight (plan-less in-progress counts); appends superseding kind=verification_mode_change record (atomic, previousMode carried). (2) read_verification_mode/has_verification_mode_record honor both kinds (last valid wins) - transition honored everywhere with no other write; capture stays no-op after transition. (3) Extension: setupVerificationEligible widened to lightweight AND (not-started OR complete Mode-A); completed-set flow = confirmation -> writer spawn (resolvePythonInterpreter + --json envelope) -> ONLY on success seed alignment + kickoff-prompt copy + locked toast; refusals/spawn failures inform and change nothing; core extracted as applyCompletedSetTransition(set, pythonPath, deps) w/ 6 branch tests. (4) Docs: workflow doc normative 'Sanctioned Mode A -> Mode B transition' section + authoring-guide/spec-md-schema/tier-model/session-state-schema pointers + ai_router CHANGELOG Unreleased entry. Verification: gpt-5-4 R1 ISSUES_FOUND (Critical S062-S3-V1-001 claimed start_session --verification-mode could supersede the change record incl. B->A - DISPROVEN by executed repro, capture immutable after ANY durable record, pinned by regression test, adjudication recorded; Major S062-S3-V1-002 missing TS invocation/fallback tests - ACCEPTED+FIXED; Minor S062-S3-V1-003 cited nonexistent docs/activity-log-schema.md - DISPROVEN, adjudication recorded) -> R2 reshaped-context narrow re-verify VERIFIED 0 issues. Suites: Python 1216 passed/1 skipped (+31), TS 849 passing (+14) + 2 pre-existing Set-026 baseline, tsc/esbuild clean. Routed $0.4046.

reason.specifics: Per the routed gemini-pro analysis at S3 close ($0.0032, recorded in ai-assignment.md), Session 4's success condition is exact conformance of many fixture files to strict schema validators and drift guards; gpt-5-4 demonstrated the strongest grasp of the project's invariants as the Sessions 2-3 verifier, so conformance-priority displaces the set-start cost-priority recommendation (gemini-2.5-pro/medium).
